description: Skill packages — chosen at end of character creation (MgT2e p.42).

traveller.name: Traveller
traveller.description: An all-round skill package, good for a campaign where the Travellers are trading one week and blowing things up the next.

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.description: For campaigns where the Travellers are operating on the fringe of Charted Space, dealing with new worlds and ancient relics.

mercenary.name: Mercenary
mercenary.description: This skills package focuses on ground combat and is aimed at combat-heavy games.

diplomat.name: Diplomat
diplomat.description: For campaigns where the Travellers are government operatives and ambassadors.

trader.name: Trader
trader.description: This skills package is for campaigns where trading and commerce are the primary activities of the Travellers.

investigator.name: Investigator
investigator.description: For campaigns centering on solving crimes and investigating mysteries.

starship.name: Starship
starship.description: This is for campaigns where the Travellers will spend almost all their time on spacecraft.

criminal.name: Criminal
criminal.description: For campaigns involving crime and elaborate heists.
